heading: Public statement of environmental liabilities
label: 6182 Public statement of environmental liabilities
text: Each year, at the same time that the Department of Energy submits its annual financial report under , the Secretary of Energy shall make available to the public a statement of environmental liabilities, as calculated for the most recent audited financial statement of the Department under section 3515 of that title, for each defense nuclear facility at which defense environmental cleanup activities are occurring.section 3516 of title 31
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2591 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)
